title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Francistown Town Council (hairdressing) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Francistown Town Council (hairdressing) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-Laws may be cited as the Francistown Town Council (Hairdressing) Bye-Laws*.
*Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these Regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.
